  • Uses of RelatesTo in org.apache.axis2.client

    Methods in org.apache.axis2.client that return RelatesTo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RelatesTo
    Options.getRelatesTo()
    Return a single instance of WS-Addressing RelatesTo that has a relationship type of either "http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing/reply" or "wsa:Reply".
    RelatesTo
    Options.getRelatesTo(String type)
    Get WS-Addressing RelatesTo item with a specified type.
    RelatesTo[]
    Options.getRelationships()
    Get all WS-Addressing RelatesTo items.

    Method
    Description
    void
    Options.addRelatesTo(RelatesTo relatesTo)
    Add WS-Addressing RelatesTo item.
    void
    Options.setRelationships(RelatesTo[] list)
    Set WS-Addressing RelatesTo items.
